title: SoniCraft Demons
description: A spooky creepypasta add-on for SoniCraft (Warning: contains gore, jumpscares, and disturbing imagery)
body:
Note: This mod requires both GeckoLib and SoniCraft in order to work!

 

Halloween is upon us, and that means the spirits of hell are coming out to play. With this in mind, I, EnderPreston, the creator of SoniCraft, am devilishly proud to present...

This addon introduces tons of new blocks, new items, a new armor/tool type, new bosses and 4 new explorable dimensions! This has been in the works for the past several months, with a lot of research and hard work put into it. No disrespect towards the awesome team that made the Vs Sonic.EXE mod for Friday Night Funkin', but I want to be able to show people the true origins and capabilities of these not-so-musical nightmares, and even show some other famous creepypastas from the Sonic fanbase. All of the current creepypastas included and/or referenced are listed below.

 

Creepypastas:

  • Sonic.EXE (Classic and Xenophanes)
  • Tails Doll
  • Genocide City
  • Friendship
  • Sink (from Below The Depths FNF mod)
  • Needlem0use
  • Starved (with Furnace Metal Sonic included)
  • Lord X (Sonic 1 PC Port)
  • EYX (Sonic the Hedgehog: Editable ROM)
  • Sally.EXE (right now, it's only the stuff from KINDANDFAIR)
  • Fatal Error

 

Of course, credit for all of these goes to their original creators.

 

It should certainly be noted that the mod won't drop you straight into the spooky stuff right off the bat. First, you'll need a pentagram, crafted by surrounding blaze powder with redstone and nether wart in a crafting table. Then, place the pentagram, place 4 candles around the pentagram in a circle, and light the candles. What happens next is up to you.

If you're not sure what to do with the pentagram, or what items you can use on it, there are pentagram recipes (along with bios for each creepypasta demon) available on SoniCraft's official website:

Link to Website

 

If you're still confused about something, or you want to report a bug, come talk to me about it on my Discord server!

Link to Discord

 

Older versions of this mod can be found on CurseForge.
